principle: Clearforge social assets should clearly signal a subject and payoff, but quality imperfections do not block otherwise safe publication.

checks.opening: Is your AI saving time or just making drafts?
Could one prompt trigger the wrong action?
Do you keep disclosure with every AI-made ad?
Are you budgeting AI as a tool or an operating expense?
